titles.en: Chapter 175 – The going out of the women to the two Eids
Chapter 175 – The going out of the women to the two Eids

segments: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ خُرُوجِ النِّسَاءِ فِي الْعِيدَيْنِ فَقَالَ لَا إِلَّا عَجُوزٌ عَلَيْهَا مَنْقَلَاهَا يَعْنِي الْخُفَّيْنِ .
arabic.text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ خُرُوجِ النِّسَاءِ فِي الْعِيدَيْنِ فَقَالَ لَا إِلَّا عَجُوزٌ عَلَيْهَا مَنْقَلَاهَا يَعْنِي الْخُفَّيْنِ .

segments: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Fazzal, from Marwan Bin Muslim, from Muhammad Bin Shurayh who said,
‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about the going out of the women during the two Eids, so he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘No, except for the elderly woman wearing their pair of shoes’.
en.hubeali.text:
Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Fazzal, from Marwan Bin Muslim, from Muhammad Bin Shurayh who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about the going out of the women during the two Eids, so he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘No, except for the elderly woman wearing their pair of shoes’.

segments: 1. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn Faddal from Marwan ibn Muslim from Muhammad ibn Shurayh who has said the following: “This is concerning my question before abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about women’s going out for the two ‘Id. He (the Imam) said, ‘No, except old women wearing their pairs of shoes.’” (Consult Fatwah about this hadith)
en.sarwar.text: 1. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn Faddal from Marwan ibn Muslim from Muhammad ibn Shurayh who has said the following: “This is concerning my question before abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about women’s going out for the two ‘Id. He (the Imam) said, ‘No, except old women wearing their pairs of shoes.’” (Consult Fatwah about this hadith)

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول كالموثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/380)
gradings.label: مجهول كالموثق
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول كالموثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/380)

narratorChain.raw: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ ابْنِ فَضَّالٍ عَنْ مَرْوَانَ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ شُرَيْحٍ قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter 175 – The going out of the women to the two Eids

segments: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ خُرُوجِ النِّسَاءِ فِي الْعِيدَيْنِ وَ الْجُمُعَةِ فَقَالَ لَا إِلَّا امْرَأَةٌ مُسِنَّةٌ .
arabic.text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ خُرُوجِ النِّسَاءِ فِي الْعِيدَيْنِ وَ الْجُمُعَةِ فَقَالَ لَا إِلَّا امْرَأَةٌ مُسِنَّةٌ .

segments: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Abu Abdullah, from Muhammad Bin Ali, from Yunus Bin Yaqoub who said,
‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about the going out of the women during the two Eids, and the Friday, so he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘No, except for an elderly woman’.
en.hubeali.text:
A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Abu Abdullah, from Muhammad Bin Ali, from Yunus Bin Yaqoub who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about the going out of the women during the two Eids, and the Friday, so he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘No, except for an elderly woman’.

segments: 2. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn abu ‘Abd Allah from Muhammad ibn Ali from Yunus ibn Ya’qub who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about women going out for ‘Id and Friday Salat (prayer). He (the Imam) said, ‘No, except old women.’” (Consult Fatwah about this hadith)
en.sarwar.text: 2. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn abu ‘Abd Allah from Muhammad ibn Ali from Yunus ibn Ya’qub who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about women going out for ‘Id and Friday Salat (prayer). He (the Imam) said, ‘No, except old women.’” (Consult Fatwah about this hadith)

narratorChain.raw: عِدَّةٌ مِنْ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ عَنْ يُونُسَ بْنِ يَعْقُوبَ قَالَ
